name: youtube-analytics
description: Reads YouTube Reporting API jobs, report types, and generated reports via the Google OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant.

risk.read: external YouTube Reporting API read of reporting-job/report-type/report metadata
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for youtube-analytics (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively (gmail precedent, docs/migration/conventions.md §4).
